user.title: VALR Authentication
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with VALR.

direct.title: VALR API Credentials
direct.description: Enter an existing VALR API key and secret. The key needs view access for balances and subaccounts.

ott.title: VALR One-Time Token
ott.description: Exchange a VALR OTT for API credentials. The view-only partner API key/secret and one-time token are only used for the exchange and are not stored.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to VALR API
error.invalid_auth: Invalid VALR API key or secret, or the key lacks required read permissions
error.invalid_partner_auth: Invalid VALR view-only API key or secret, or the key lacks required permissions
error.invalid_ott: Invalid or expired VALR one-time token
error.invalid_ott_response: VALR did not return API credentials for the one-time token

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to VALR API
